notes: CSA's vulnerability disclosure and security reporting channels. CSA operates a responsible disclosure program and publishes a security.txt file per RFC 9116.

data.description: Machine-readable security contact and disclosure information per RFC 9116.
data.notes: Standard location at /.well-known/security.txt. Contains contact information, preferred languages, disclosure policy link, and expiration date.

match_nodes.description: CSA's responsible disclosure policy and reporting channel

data.description: Primary channel for reporting security vulnerabilities in CSA systems and services.
data.notes: Contact security@cloudsecurityalliance.org for vulnerability reports. CSA follows responsible disclosure practices.
